desc: Used to pacify dangerous animals.

Watering Can

name: Dark Spirit
desc: Spirit of Mutisha. A Dark aura surrounds this spirit.

desc: Spirit of Van Cliff. A Dense, Dark aura surrounds this spirit.

name: Death Spirit
desc: Spirit of the Bone Dragon. A Deathly aura surrounds this spirit.

name: Combined Spirit
desc: This is the combined spirit of dark, blood and death. It has a shiny color.

name: Spirit Sack
desc: A sack that can carry spirits.

desc: Right piece of a helmet.

desc: Front piece of a helmet.

desc: Rear piece of a helmet.

desc: Top piece of a helmet.

desc: Christmas event item

desc: Christmas event item

desc: Christmas event item

desc: Christmas event item

name: Tree piece 5
desc: Christmas event item

name: Piece of Dark abyss
desc: Piece the came from the Dark abyss. It can be obtained when you defeat Carsharp.

name: Elga fellowship medal
desc: Medal that shows the owner can go on an expedition of Elga.

name: Chocolate Candy
desc: The Gingerbread man's main ingredient for his special chocolates!

name: Proof of mutation
desc: Not a perfectly mutated monster, but it leaves some small traces.

name: Piece of United Energy
desc: Monsters who have united with a special energy are left with a piece in their body. They can be found in the Ork Field

name: Split Energy
desc: Some monsters united with a special energy and started to transform themselves, making a different monster.

name: Nucleus of United Energy
desc: Nucleus of a United Energy has more energy than a Piece of United Energy. They can be found at the Orc Field

name: Mutated Split Energy
desc: Unlike normal split energy which split into two pieces, mutated split energy split into multiple pieces that are very similar to original.

name: Crystal of Energy
desc: Energy does not have any special shape and it stays shining. When it's united with another lifeform they becomes a crystal. Can be found at the Orc hero.

name: Piece of Crystal
desc: When the energy unites with a monster it leaves a special piece in their body. They can be found at Glast Heim.

name: Nucleus of crystal
desc: Nucleus of a crystal has much stronger energy compared to a Piece of crystal. They can be found at Glast Heim

name: Rapid Grass
desc: A special grass that is known to speed up the monster split process. Can be found on special monsters.

name: Crystal of Energy
desc: Energy does not have any special shape and it stays shining, but when it's united with another lifeform they become a crystal. Can be found at Dark Load.

name: Broken Valkyrie Hat
desc: A Broken Valkyrie Hat. You can't wear it.

name: Spiritual Protection Stone
desc: This Protection Stone allows one person entry to the Dungeon of Spirits.

name: Halloween Token
desc: To praise ghost hunters, Randy prepared a Halloween Token. Wait! Isn't Randy a ghost as well?

name: Ghost Soul
desc: A concentrated energy chunk, it's all that remains from the defeated Halloween Ghost.

name: Kitty Box
desc: This box contains a cute kitty!

name: Wrapped Package
desc: A wrapped up package, looks important.

name: Delivery Receipt
desc: Proof of delivery for Hime's package. You better take this to him.

name: The 119th Element
desc: Perhaps it could be used to fix the broken space energy.

name: A Package
desc: It's heavy, there might be a weapon inside.

name: Yogurt
desc: A tasty milk drink. It's good for you.

name: Artis's Weapon
desc: Larell's training weapon is better than this!

name: Rat Tail
desc: A little Raty Tail!

name: Rusty Armour
desc: Duraman's Rusty Armour

name: Panacea Ointment
desc: You could say this ointment is blesses by the god Panacea, the goddess of Universal Remedy.

name: Fresh Nail
desc: A fresh nail from an Underground Graveyard Mummy!

name: Banking Procedures Manual
desc: Remember to read the manual before you go any further.

name: Drakan adventurer's rice ball
desc: Traditional first aid tool from Kazeura village. There are various sized acupuncture needles inside.

name: Wyvern Kyero's Egg
desc: Wyvern Egg left when Kyero died. Can't be hatched yet.

name: Huge Glass Incubator
desc: A glass incubator shaped in cylinder form.

name: Infrared Lamp
desc: Infrared Lamp which can be used when you increase the heat.

name: Multipurpose Electronic Device Kit
desc: It's fun to make electronic products by yourself!

name: Crabby stick
desc: Crab stick which is full of Crabby's soft meat.

name: Kazeura's Combat Order
desc: Top secret document that Ganu brought to Port of the Wind.

name: Combat Order
desc: Top secret document that Ganu brought to Port of the Wind.

name: Temple archpriest's recommendation
desc: priest Maitri's recommendation for retaking fellowship of precious treasure.

name: Half-eaten Bread
desc: Half-eaten Bread someone left. No one would dare to eat it in this condition.

name: Mouldy Cake
desc: Colourful cake covered in mold.

name: Cursed Cookie
desc: Cookie with cursed power. It spoils your appetite when you look into it.

name: Malfunction Report
desc: Malfunction Report which is printed through AutoLunch5's high-tech system.

name: Dr. Farrell's Letter
desc: Letter Dr.Farrell got from Paris

name: Colin's Thank You Note
desc: Thank You Note from Colin to convey messages of thanks from the Dragon fellowship to Drakan Warriors.

name: Skeleton patterned Bandana
desc: Cheap Bandana which only third-rate Pirates would use. Only word to describe this bandana is 'terrible'.

desc: Captain Hat which Hookah keeps as a souvenir. He got it from his first combat victory in the navy.

name: String from broken accessory
desc: Decoration string from the Precious Treasure

name: Purifying scroll
desc: Scroll which has spells for purifying Precious Treasure.

name: Unknown Pet Egg
desc: Pet Egg which a female hunter of the Mika Tribe left behind. I wonder when it will hatch.

name: Ultrasonic Device
desc: Electronic device that mimics a bats ultrasonic ability.

name: Old Transistor
desc: Cheap integrated circuit which you can find many of when you disassemble the old electronic products.

name: Cinnamon
desc: Ingredient of chinese medicine to relieve the fatigue of soldiers.

desc: Ingredient of chinese medicine to relieve the fatigue of soldiers.

desc: Ingredient of chinese medicine to relieve the fatigue of soldiers.

desc: Ingredient of chinese medicine to relieve the fatigue of soldiers.

desc: Ingredient of chinese medicine to relieve the fatigue of soldiers.

name: Ginger
desc: Ingredient of chinese medicine to relieve the fatigue of soldiers.

desc: Ingredient of chinese medicine to relieve the fatigue of soldiers.

desc: It will definitely help keep your digestive system healthy.

desc: Special underwear to make you look like a dragon.

name: Orient Single-edged Blade
desc: Force +3, but not able to equip.

name: Farrell's code manual volume#2
desc: Code manual to understand Farrell's code. It's written by Larell

name: Shroom tribe's Secret memo
desc: The clue we needed to find out what the Shroom tribe is up to.

desc: Black Dragon Lord, Elga's Myth is pictured on page 5, as 'Story of Wind, Earth, Water and Fire'

name: Spirit Mythology Scroll
desc: Parchment scroll which describes the Myth of the Black Dragon Lord, Elga

name: Etellight
desc: Potion with special effect

name: Fiend's Feather
desc: One of Devil's trinity. Dark Magic ingredients to call souls from the beyond.

name: Fiend's Scale
desc: One of Devil's trinity. Dark Magic's ingredients to call souls.

name: Fiend's Leather
desc: One of Devil's trinity. Dark Magic's ingredients to call souls.

desc: Common Skeleton bone

desc: Magma Coral Fields' warrior,Lava Boomboom's favorite thing

desc: Piece of Marduk's bone

name: Wooden Picaxe
desc: For minors, it's their alter ago.

name: Candle
desc: Illuminate dark places with this candle

name: Torch
desc: Necessary thing to go inside a coal mine.

desc: Used in the creation of torches.

name: Cuneiform script
desc: 'Magma Coral Fields' tribe use it when they have their traditional ceremony.

name: Firefly Needle
desc: Needle of poisonous insect, Firefly.

name: Skeleton Tomahawk
desc: Axe made of pieces of bones

name: Batocksin
desc: Poison that make supplier's face size smaller.

name: Swamp monster's hair decoration
desc: Monster's hair decoration which may disgust you

desc: Javelin that Webfoot tribe use. It's light to use.

desc: Armour Webfoot tribe usually use.

name: Nagaui Staff
desc: Staff that Webfoot tribe's shaman uses .

desc: Queen Vella's Healthy Food. It contains minerals and Amino acid, but also poisonous energy for people.

name: Purifying scroll
desc: Scroll which has spells for purifying Precious Treasure.

name: Tianshan Snow Lotus
desc: Chinese medicine which make you be energetic.

name: Poison tester Charm
desc: Magical charm to test if there's Poison inside, like a litmus paper.

name: Broken Magical Flute
desc: Magical Flute that can be used to lure Zaro away.

name: Thick Ebony Wooden Stick
desc: Stick made of Ebony Wood. Cumba monsters are bringing them.

name: Pring's Feather
desc: Feather of Pring's wing

name: Ebony Wooden Stick
desc: Stick made of Rare Ebony Wood. Killo always hold it to be looked like an ascetic.

name: Eight Trigrams of Seven stars
desc: The Eight Trigrams for divination which has seven Spirit Shards shows you how to track down the Precious Treasure.

name: Old Circular Saw Blade
desc: Old and rusty felling operation tool for Woodman group of Burnaun.

name: Pyrei's letter
desc: Letter written by Pyrei. Pyrei wrote it even in Kentarous' Language to persuade Hel Krouzer.

name: Battle Pet Advancement Kit
desc: Kit containing everything required for a Pet Merchant to create an Evolution Crystal

name: Awakening Flute
desc: Flute that makes the listening awake from even the deepest sleep.

name: Awakening Flute
desc: Flute that makes the listening awake from even the deepest sleep.

name: Map of the truth
desc: Spirit Shard which carved the location of the Altar of Time on Golem Pythanous' body.

name: Pythanous' Spirit Shard
desc: Spirit Shard came out from Pythanous' body

name: Akanai's Shadow Essence
desc: Essence which has shadow energy left from purified Akanai. Danku is looking for this item.

name: Piece of Black Claw
desc: To be traded with Equipment from the Black Dragon Lord Recipe.

name: Prune Pouch
desc: This dirty pouch is full of Prunes, a real delicacy across continent!

name: Dragon Liquor
desc: Legendary seasoning. Nothing can beat its taste.

name: Backpack Upgrade Kit
desc: Upgrades a regular backpack to an advanced backpack. Wings to improve the rotational force and power efficiency are included.

name: Materia Metaloom
desc: Material to Repair an Advanced Backpack

name: Vertadium
desc: Unique metal found from meteorite fragments which have fallen to Dragotaka. It can alloy with Steel.

name: Armored Golem's Steel Horn
desc: Part of an Armored Golem. Made of Vertadium Alloy.

name: Armored Barrel's Steel Tail
desc: Part of an Armored Barrel. Made of Vertadium Alloy.

name: Armored Kampaling's Steel Jaw
desc: Part of an Armored Kampaling. Made of Vertadium Alloy.

name: Skystone
desc: A Spirit Shard that was used in building the floating city, Sky Temple. It tends to float in the sky.

name: Syamalky's Parchment
desc: To bring back Parmir's memory, Syamalky drew Parmir's Coat of Arms onto a piece of parchment.

name: Tarquin Liquid
desc: Unknown holy energy source that science today cannot identify. It seems like a concentrated Spirit Shard, according to Dr.Noel.

name: Experimental Socket Card Box
desc: A box containing a Socket Card made from Spirit Shards. With luck, it may contain several  Socket Cards.

name: Spiritual Card Socket Adapter
desc: An adapter that has a slot to insert a Socket Card containing a Spiritual Element. By installing this adapter onto the equipment, it enables the use of a Socket Card.

name: Helmet with a Socket
desc: A Helmet with a Socket. Looks fashionable.

name: Teeth of Shark Deckhand
desc: Teeth of Shark that says bring luck. Looks like something is between teeth.

name: Crabby Shell
desc: Shell of Crabby. Dosen't look tasty

name: Blue Shark Fin
desc: Blue shark fin. They are expansive.

name: Mulosca Skin
desc: Skin of a Mulosca. It's very smooth.

name: Muscular Pain Relief Potion
desc: It looks like a potion, but gives powerful muscular pain relief.

name: Yellow Star
desc: Yellow star carried by Starry Lolo. Why do they carry this?

name: Harpoon Tip
desc: Tip of a Harpoon. Looks sharp.

name: Mum's Thing
desc: Eye patch worn by pirates. Why does mum have this?

name: Hat of Captain Hookah
desc: Very stylish hat. There is rumour saying that Captain is bald.

name: Fabric Bunch
desc: Spiked Mace Mummy's Fabric bunch

name: Love Contract
desc: A contract that will tie someone till their death!

name: Oak Tree Barrel
desc: A traditional barrel to keep a traditional drink.

name: Stolen Helmet
desc: A trophy from a past war.

name: Special Banana
desc: Monkey like Banana, but it is not just monkey who likes Banana

name: Five Spice
desc: A legendary spice. But it is not as good as the legend says.

name: Fish
desc: A fresh and tasty fish. Sharks like fish.

name: Lunch Fish
desc: A meal prepared with Fish. Looks and smells good.

name: Crabby Shell
desc: Crabby Shells are very healthy for you. Albiet a little crunchy.

name: Shark Tail
desc: Shark Tails are easy to find.

name: Special Spice
desc: A special spice used in all good soups.

name: Seaweed
desc: A special seaweed used as flavourful ingredient in seafood.

name: Blue Jelly Extract
desc: It says it will make your skin shine!

name: Locked Box
desc: A heavy and tightly locked box.

name: Captain Hookah's Secret Key
desc: This key might be able to open Captain Hookah's Locked boxes.

name: Whale Tears
desc: A beautiful whale tear, if the whale doesn't get its tear back it will surely die.

name: Jess's Wooden Chest
desc: Jess left his belongings in this Wooden Chest. It's very light.

name: Jess's Treasure Chest
desc: The treasure chest Jess keeps his most precious stuff in.

name: Jess's Treasure Chest Key
desc: A key to open Jess's Treasure Chest

name: Earthworm
desc: Primo uses Earthworms when fishing.

name: Crabby Roe
desc: Yummy. Haven't you tasted a Crabby Roe yet?

name: Starry Stock
desc: A staple ingredient for many potions.

name: Magic Black Pearl
desc: A Black Pearl with Magical Power. It's black colour attracts many people.

name: Meteorite Fragments
desc: Meteorite Fragments. They look strange.

name: Puffer Roe
desc: Tasty Puffer Roe. Be careful. It contains poison inside.

name: Golem Core
desc: Known as one of the best baits.

name: Rakerta's Tail
desc: It is the best fishing bait. It will surely attract a large shoal of fish.

name: Book of Sages Page
desc: A page from Jeremy's Book of Sages. Only Sages can read it.

name: Purifying Cleanser
desc: A Marvelous cleanser that can remove book stains. You will see the difference!

name: Leo's Necklace
desc: Leo keeps this necklace in loving memory of his mum.

name: Crabby stick
desc: Looks delicious. Can also be used as polish.

name: Crispin's Pouch
desc: Crispin's lost pouch. It may contain some gold.

name: Boarding Pass
desc: A Military Ship Boarding Pass, should allow you to board a military vessel. But it looks suspicious.

name: Genuine Boarding Pass
desc: A Genuine Boarding Pass that will allow you to board a military ship.

name: Round White Sculpture
desc: Victor's artwork. It rathers looks like a skull.

name: Round Eyed Sculpture
desc: Victor's genuine artwork. It shows much artistic talent.

name: Leo's Father's Dagger
desc: Leo's Father's Dagger. Still sharp.

name: A Letter from Leo's Parents
desc: This letter was written by Leo's deceased parents.

name: Captain's Log
desc: The Captain's Log that was left in the wrecked ship.

name: Attack Plans
desc: Plans for an attack on Port of the Winds.

name: Friendly Letter
desc: A friendly letter Sijin sent to Hime.

name: Aloe Vera Plant
desc: Mash this plant a bit and then rub it on your skin. Calms itchiness.

name: Skin Cleanser
desc: It kills germs.

name: Tattered Bandage
desc: It has a strong healing power.

name: Strong Tooth
desc: Sharp and hard. What is it made of?

name: Claire's Cheese
desc: The cheese Claire serves to her children.

name: Rusty Sword
desc: It's rusty, but you could still give it a good swing.

name: Smooth 'Brick Red' Fabric
desc: A deep 'brick red' fabric.

name: Delicate Bead
desc: A delicate bead. This would be prefect for embriodery.

name: First Jewel
desc: Looks like it might be a diamond!

name: Second Jewel
desc: Looks like an Emerald.

name: Rusty Helmet
desc: Rusty but it could still be worn.

name: Cute Fossil
desc: A fossil of an ancient pet.

name: Shark's Fin
desc: A rare and expensive ingredient.

name: Sack of Grain
desc: This grain will make the best noodles!

name: Mummy Jerky
desc: Yummy. I love it! What is this made of again? Mummy?!!!

name: Torn up Receipt Piece
desc: A piece of a torn up receipt.

name: Apple Seed
desc: A very rare and precious Cheese Apple Seed. Plant it to grow a Cheese Apple Tree!

name: Pincers
desc: Creamy texture and a yummy taste!. Crabby Claws are the best!

name: Crabby Claws Lunch Set
desc: A beautifully presented crabby claw picnic set!

name: Focusing Lens
desc: This lens can focus sunlight into a strong beam.

name: Lunch Bag
desc: A lunch bag, contains some nutritious snacks!

name: Battle Plan
desc: The full details of Artis's battle plans are in this document. Keep it safe!

name: Challenge
desc: A letter frome Hime challenging Frank!

name: Red Herb
desc: A special herb, known for it's nice smell.

name: Green Herb
desc: Ingredient for special potion

name: Poisonous pumpkin
desc: Bite it and fall asleep

name: Skull Blood
desc: Smells fresh and delicious.

name: Mercenary Note
desc: Thomas's Mercenaries Contract

name: Swirl's riceball
desc: Swirl's speciality, riceball

name: Jess's coin
desc: Hey Jess! You dropped this coin.

name: Beginner's sword
desc: Beginner's sword for Frank.

name: Chamomile tablet
desc: A mild sedative that relieves anxiety.

name: Warrior's sword
desc: Mercenary will like this sword.

name: Mystery Box
desc:
A mystery box Hime is waiting for from Sen.
Cannot guess what is inside.

name: Pirate Sword
desc: A Pirate Sword used by Kalygon

name: Kajimodo's tooth
desc: Kajimodo's decayed tooth

name: Crunchberry
desc: Paul Burnaun's favorite snack.

name: Shroom Meat
desc: A meat that will calm you down, tast is not so good

name: Calm Soup
desc: A soup to calm mind. Taste horrible.

name: Iron Bullet
desc:
A bullet used for Kalygon gun.
Not sure when they can be used.

name: Luxurious ring
desc: Where did you get it Jack?

name: Luxurious necklace
desc: Where did you get it Jess?

name: Mergon's Eyeball
desc: There's no chance to see this as a ball-shaped candy.

name: Zombie Leather
desc: Zombie's Leather which has been aged using a low ripening temperature.

name: Treasure Pocket
desc: This small treasure pocket is very handy.

name: Holy Water
desc: Holy Water made of pure early morning dew

name: Nutritious Bones
desc: It's different from common bones.

name: Rib bone with a little meat
desc: There's a small amount of meat left on this bone.

name: Shark's Fin
desc: Fresh and elegant Fin on Shark's body.

name: Good piece of Armor
desc: This armor piece seems to be useful for reproduction as it has great quality.

name: Dragon Knight cannon set
desc: Portable cannon set which the Dragon Knight uses.

name: Solid Shining Breastplate
desc: Breastplate of Lord of Night. It has great quality.

name: The order of Honour
desc: This order proves the owners honour.

name: Decorative neat Bandage
desc: Neat Bandage that Mummies keep for special festival.

name: Armor Decoration
desc: If you collect those Feather decorations of Armor, you can even make them look like a bunch of flowers.

name: Fighter's Lei
desc: It's made of neat ribbon and Armor Decoration to be given to soldiers.

name: Solid Spiked Mace
desc: Spiked Mace Mummy's favorite weapon.

name: New recruit's Supply
desc: Basic Supply Set for New recruite.

name: Combat Ration
desc: Soldiers' necessaries, you also need hot boiled water to eat it.

name: Dudu's thick Toenail
desc: Thick Toenail Dodu use it to dig the ground.

name: Ahtoo's Gorgeous Fang
desc: The fang proves owner to be Mole's Boss, it has pretty high value because of it has long and great quality.

name: Shaman's Feather
desc: Hair decoration of Shamans. They believe it gives them better power.

name: Rainbow colored Ash powder
desc: Upset Spark's leftover. It looks like a colorful eye shadow.

name: Antique Coffin
desc: Antique Coffin shows what Kajimodo likes. It doesn't contain any corpes.

name: Kazeura Coin
desc: A gold coin with a noble Dragon picture(Event Item)

name: A piece of a broken treasurebox
Black Dragon Nail
desc: Sharp and stong Nail of Elga. Can be used for Gloves of Black Dragon Lord production.

name: Black Dragon Wing Bone
desc: An material needed for Cape of Black Dragon Lord. But hard to find.

name: Secret Scroll of Cherry Blossom
desc: Only who is recognized in the test can own the seal of Cherry blossom.
